items.title: Straffemiss av Sørloth da Real Sociedad ble cupmester i straffedrama
items.description:

items.description: Fifa hits back at criticism from New Jersey Governor Mikie Sherrill, saying vastly inflated train fares at the 2026 World Cup will have a "chilling effect".
